meta.description: Triggers when a new Client record is added to the Clients DB. Creates a linked Blueprint page, then updates the Client's Status to 'Blueprint drafted' and sets the relation.
env_required: NOTION_CLIENTS_DB_ID      — Notion database ID for Clients (already used by intake workflow)
NOTION_BLUEPRINTS_DB_ID   — Notion database ID for Blueprints (new — add to .env)
setup_checklist: 1. Verify the Clients DB has a Relation property named 'Blueprint' pointing at the Blueprints DB.
2. Verify the Blueprints DB has a Relation property named 'Client' pointing at the Clients DB.
3. Confirm 'Status' select options in Clients DB include 'Blueprint drafted'.
4. Confirm 'Status' select options in Blueprints DB include 'Draft'.
5. Set NOTION_BLUEPRINTS_DB_ID in your .env and in n8n credentials.
6. Activate this workflow AFTER the intake workflow is live (so Client pages already exist).

blockValues.textContent: Auto-generated from intake form. Fill in pain description, 30-day outcome, and proposed solution before sending to client.

={{ 'Company: ' + $('Extract Client Fields').item.json.company_name + '\nContact: ' + $('Extract Client Fields').item.json.contact_name + ' (' + $('Extract Client Fields').item.json.contact_email + ')' + '\nTeam size: ' + $('Extract Client Fields').item.json.team_size + '  |  Cloud: ' + $('Extract Client Fields').item.json.cloud }}
→ Pull full pain description from the linked Client page (stored as page blocks there).
→ Pull outcome from the linked Client page.
[ To be filled in by team ]

={{ 'CRM: ' + $('Extract Client Fields').item.json.tools_crm + '
PM: ' + $('Extract Client Fields').item.json.tools_pm + '
Comms: ' + $('Extract Client Fields').item.json.tools_comms + '
Automation: ' + $('Extract Client Fields').item.json.automation }}

parameters.name: content
parameters.value:
={{ '📋 **Blueprint drafted: ' + $('Extract Client Fields').item.json.company_name + '**
> Pain: ' + $('Extract Client Fields').item.json.pain_primary + '
> Team: ' + $('Extract Client Fields').item.json.team_size + '  |  Cloud: ' + $('Extract Client Fields').item.json.cloud + '
> Client: ' + $('Extract Client Fields').item.json.page_url + '
> Blueprint: ' + $('Create Blueprint Page').item.json.url }}
